routing.name: page.tsx
routing.desc: Halaman yang dirender pada URL tertentu.
routing.example:
// app/about/page.tsx export default function AboutPage() { return

About

}

routing.name: layout.tsx
routing.desc: Layout pembungkus untuk halaman dan nested layout.
routing.example:
// app/layout.tsx
export default function RootLayout({ children }) { return <html><body>{children}</body></html> }

routing.name: loading.tsx
routing.desc: UI loading yang ditampilkan saat halaman/segmen dimuat.
routing.example:
// app/dashboard/loading.tsx export default function Loading() { return

Loading...

}

routing.name: error.tsx
routing.desc: Error boundary untuk menangani error di halaman/segmen.
routing.example:
'use client';
export default function Error({ error, reset }) { return <button onClick={reset}>Try again</button> }

routing.name: not-found.tsx
routing.desc: UI yang ditampilkan ketika halaman tidak ditemukan.
routing.example:
// app/not-found.tsx export default function NotFound() { return

404 - Not Found

}

routing.name: route.ts
routing.desc: Route handler untuk membuat API endpoint.
routing.example:
// app/api/users/route.ts
export async function GET() { return NextResponse.json([...]) }

routing.name: middleware.ts
routing.desc: Middleware yang dijalankan sebelum request selesai.

routing.name: Dynamic Routes
routing.example:
// app/blog/[id]/page.tsx
export default function BlogPost({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) { ... }

routing.name: Parallel Routes
routing.desc: Render beberapa halaman secara paralel di layout yang sama.

routing.name: Intercepting Routes
routing.desc: Mengintersep navigasi untuk menampilkan halaman alternatif (modal, dll).

server-client.name: Server Component (default)
server-client.desc: Komponen yang dirender di server. Tidak bisa pakai hook/event handler.
server-client.example:
export default async function ServerComp() { const data = await fetch(...); return
{data}
}

server-client.name: Client Component
server-client.desc: Komponen interaktif dengan state/effect/event handler. Gunakan direktif 'use client'.

server-client.name: Composition Pattern
server-client.desc: Server component bisa wrapping client component.

server-client.name: Server Actions
server-client.desc: Fungsi async yang berjalan di server, bisa dipanggil dari client/form.
server-client.example:
'use server';
export async function createPost(formData: FormData) { ... }

data-fetching.name: fetch (server)
data-fetching.desc: Native fetch API di server component, otomatis caching.

data-fetching.name: no-store (dynamic)
data-fetching.desc: Selalu ambil data terbaru tanpa cache.

data-fetching.name: generateStaticParams
data-fetching.desc: Pre-render halaman dinamis di build time.
data-fetching.example: export async function generateStaticParams() { const posts = await fetch(...); return posts.map(p => ({ id: p.id })) }

data-fetching.name: React cache()
data-fetching.desc: Cache hasil fungsi untuk request yang sama (dedup).
data-fetching.example:
import { cache } from 'react';
export const getUser = cache(async (id: string) => { ... });

navigation.name: <Link>
navigation.desc: Komponen untuk navigasi client-side dengan prefetch.

navigation.name: useRouter
navigation.example:
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
const router = useRouter(); router.push('/dashboard');

navigation.name: redirect
navigation.example:
import { redirect } from 'next/navigation';
export async function ServerAction() { redirect('/login') }

navigation.name: usePathname
navigation.example:
import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation';
const pathname = usePathname();

navigation.name: useSearchParams
navigation.example:
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
const searchParams = useSearchParams(); const q = searchParams.get('q');

metadata.name: Static Metadata
metadata.example:
import { Metadata } from 'next';
export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'Home', description: '...' };

metadata.name: Dynamic Metadata
metadata.desc: Export fungsi generateMetadata untuk metadata dinamis.
metadata.example: export async function generateMetadata({ params }): Promise<Metadata> { return { title: params.id } }

optimasi.name: next/image
optimasi.desc: Komponen gambar yang dioptimasi (lazy, blur-up, webp).
optimasi.example:
import Image from 'next/image';
<Image src="/hero.jpg" width={800} height={600} alt="Hero" />

optimasi.name: next/font
next/script
optimasi.desc: Memuat script eksternal dengan strategi (afterInteractive, lazyOnload).

optimasi.name: next/dynamic
optimasi.example:
import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const HeavyComponent = dynamic(() => import('./Heavy'), { loading: () =>

Loading...

});

caching.name: revalidateTag
caching.desc: Revalidasi data berdasarkan tag yang digunakan di fetch.

caching.name: unstable_cache (experimental)
caching.example:
import { unstable_cache } from 'next/cache';
const getCachedData = unstable_cache(async () => { ... }, ['key'], { revalidate: 60 });
